basic_details.job_title: IIT Indore Staff Nurse Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Indore (IIT Indore) Staff Nurse Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of IIT Indore. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced through the IIT Indore Staff Nurse Recruitment 2026. Candidates aged between 21 to 45 years who have B.Sc. Nursing/ Diploma in Nursing and Midwifery with registration from the State Nursing Council and relevant experience are eligible to apply for these Staff Nurse vacancies. The online application process for IIT Indore Staff Nurse Recruitment 2026 has started and will remain open until 19-05-2026. Candidates can d

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 21 years Maximum Age: 45 years Age relaxation will be as per government rules.

qualification.education_qualification: B.Sc. Nursing/ Diploma in Nursing and Midwifery
qualification.details: Staff Nurse: B.Sc. Nursing/ Diploma in Nursing and Midwifery. Registration from the State Nursing Council. Minimum Experience: 2 years after B.Sc. Nursing and 5 years after Diploma in a reputed hospital/Institute.

selection_process: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIT Indore Staff Nurse Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 19-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Indore to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for IIT Indore Staff Nurse Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the Staff Nurse positions at IIT Indore is 19th May 2026. Ensure all details are accurate before the deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Staff Nurse post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies announced for the Staff Nurse position in the Indian Institute of Technology Indore recruitment drive for 2026.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Staff Nurse role?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a B.Sc. Nursing or a Diploma in Nursing and Midwifery, along with registration from the State Nursing Council. Relevant experience is also mandatory.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for applying to the Staff Nurse position?
faq.answer: The age limit for applying candidates is between 21 years and 45 years. Age relaxation may be applicable as per government norms.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Staff Nurse position?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the Staff Nurse post will receive a monthly salary ranging from Rs. 25,000/- to Rs. 35,000/-.

faq.question: Q6. Is there an application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, as per the information available, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the mode of application for IIT Indore Staff Nurse jobs?
faq.answer: The application process for the IIT Indore Staff Nurse recruitment is entirely online. Candidates need to apply through the official website or the provided application link.

faq.question: Q8. What type of job is this recruitment for?
faq.answer: This recruitment is for contractual positions at the Indian Institute of Technology Indore.

faq.question: Q9. What is the minimum experience required for a Staff Nurse?
faq.answer: A minimum of 2 years of experience is required after completing B.Sc. Nursing, or 5 years of experience after completing a Diploma in Nursing and Midwifery.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF link is provided in the "Important Links" section of this article. It is advisable to download and read it thoroughly.
